Macros for declaring and registering JavaScript wrapper functions, class constructors, and argument checks.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a set of macros for creating and registering JavaScript function wrappers in the JerryScript engine, specifically for use with the mbed platform. The macros facilitate the declaration and registration of global functions, class constructors, and class functions, allowing for seamless integration of C functions into the JavaScript environment. Additionally, the file includes macros for argument checking, ensuring that functions receive the correct number and type of arguments, and providing error messages when expectations are not met. The naming conventions used in the macros help generate unique identifiers for the functions, constructors, and class methods, which are essential for the registration process in the JerryScript engine.
